label.purpose: Section nav headers and small captions.

shadows.name: selected-glow
shadows.purpose: Gold glow on active mode pills.

motion.name: ease-hover
motion.purpose: Playful overshoot for hover scale transforms.

motion.name: duration-slow
motion.purpose: XP ring and progress bar transitions.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: Gold primary call-to-action. Used for key actions (submit, save, confirm).
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; gap: 0.5rem; padding: 0.75rem 1rem; background: #fbbf24; color: #000; font-family: Inter, -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Segoe UI', Roboto, sans-serif; font-size: 1rem; font-weight: 600; border: none; border-radius: 8px; cursor: pointer; min-height: 44px; transition: background 0.15s ease, transform 0.15s cubic-bezier(0.34, 1.56, 0.64, 1); } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background: #f59e0b; transform: scale(1.05); } .ds-btn-primary:active { transform: scale(0.98); } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #fbbf24; outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Secondary Button
components.description: Glass secondary action. For less prominent controls.
components.css: .ds-btn-secondary { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; gap: 0.5rem; padding: 0.75rem 1rem; background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.1); color: #fff; font-family: Inter, -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Segoe UI', Roboto, sans-serif; font-size: 1rem; font-weight: 600; border: none; border-radius: 8px; cursor: pointer; min-height: 44px; transition: background 0.15s ease; } .ds-btn-secondary:hover { background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.2); } .ds-btn-secondary:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.5); outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Danger Button
components.description: Destructive action button (delete, remove, sign out).
components.css: .ds-btn-danger { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; gap: 0.5rem; padding: 0.75rem 1rem; background: #dc2626; color: #fff; font-family: Inter, -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Segoe UI', Roboto, sans-serif; font-size: 1rem; font-weight: 600; border: none; border-radius: 8px; cursor: pointer; min-height: 44px; transition: background 0.15s ease, transform 0.15s cubic-bezier(0.34, 1.56, 0.64, 1); } .ds-btn-danger:hover { background: #b91c1c; transform: scale(1.05); } .ds-btn-danger:active { transform: scale(0.98); } .ds-btn-danger:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #dc2626; outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Ghost Button
components.description: Border-only tertiary action. For dismiss or less important controls.
components.css: .ds-btn-ghost { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; gap: 0.5rem; padding: 0.75rem 1rem; background: transparent; color: #d1d5db; font-family: Inter, -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Segoe UI', Roboto, sans-serif; font-size: 1rem; font-weight: 600; border: 1px solid rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.2); border-radius: 8px; cursor: pointer; min-height: 44px; transition: background 0.15s ease, color 0.15s ease; } .ds-btn-ghost:hover { background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.1); color: #fff; } .ds-btn-ghost:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.5); outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Default Card
components.description: Standard glass container for content sections.
components.html:
Card Title

Content description goes here.
components.css: .ds-card { background: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.2); backdrop-filter: blur(8px); -webkit-backdrop-filter: blur(8px); border-radius: 12px; padding: 1.1rem; border: 1px solid rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.08); }

components.name: Primary Card
components.description: Gold-accented card for featured or primary content.
components.html:
Featured

Gold-accented card content.
components.css: .ds-card-primary { background: rgba(251, 191, 36, 0.08); backdrop-filter: blur(8px); -webkit-backdrop-filter: blur(8px); border-radius: 12px; padding: 1.1rem; border: 1px solid rgba(251, 191, 36, 0.2); }

components.name: Text Input
components.description: Standard text input with dark glass style and gold focus.

components.name: Mode Pill
components.description: Selectable pill for scale modes. Active = gold glow.
components.css: .ds-pill { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 0.4rem; padding: 0.6rem 1.1rem; background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.04); border: 1px solid rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.08); border-radius: 999px; color: #9ca3af; font-size: 0.85rem; font-weight: 600; font-family: Inter, -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Segoe UI', Roboto, sans-serif; cursor: pointer; transition: all 0.18s ease; white-space: nowrap; } .ds-pill:hover { background: rgba(251, 191, 36, 0.08); border-color: rgba(251, 191, 36, 0.3); color: #e5e7eb; transform: translateY(-1px); } .ds-pill-active { background: linear-gradient(135deg, rgba(251, 191, 36, 0.25), rgba(249, 115, 22, 0.18)); border-color: rgba(251, 191, 36, 0.7); color: #fbbf24; font-weight: 700; box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px rgba(251, 191, 36, 0.1), 0 4px 18px rgba(251, 191, 36, 0.2); transform: scale(1.05); }

components.description: Avatar + XP ring + level display in sidebar header.

narrative.overview:
Strubloid is a dark, warm environment that puts the instrument between the user and the theory. The interface steps back — deep indigo gradients, translucent glass surfaces, and a single gold accent — so the fretboard, keyboard, and notes are what demand attention. It's a practice room at golden hour: focused, warm, without distraction.

The system uses layered glass for depth: semi-transparent surfaces floated over a rich gradient background, with backdrop-filter blur creating the illusion of physical depth. Gold (#fbbf24) is the one voice for interactive intent — buttons, active navigation, highlights, and progress. Everything else is quiet support: muted gray text, subtle borders, low-contrast section dividers.

This is explicitly not a corporate dashboard or a sterile productivity tool. The warmth of the gold accent, the depth of the purple-indigo gradient, and the playful scale transforms on buttons and cards keep the energy musical and inviting.
keyCharacteristics: Dark gradient background (blue → purple → indigo) as the anchor atmosphere
Single gold accent for all interactive states — one voice, not a rainbow
Glass surfaces with backdrop-filter blur for card/panel depth
Sans-serif only (Inter), weight-driven hierarchy, no decorative typography
Playful hover states: lift, scale, glow — feedback that feels responsive, not mechanical
Responsive to 320px with a bottom-nav mobile layout

rules.name: The One Voice Rule
rules.body: Gold is the only interactive accent. Active nav items, primary buttons, selected pills, highlighted scale degrees — all use the same gold. Diluting interactive states across multiple colors erodes the user's learned mapping. Gold's rarity (≤15% of any given screen) is the point.

rules.name: The Glass Depth Rule
rules.body: Depth comes from opacity, not from shadow. Closer surfaces have higher opacity and stronger blur. The gradient background sits at full opacity; cards sit at 0.2–0.35 opacity with 8–12px blur; modals use 0.7 overlay with 4px blur. No box-shadow substitutes for this hierarchy.

rules.name: The Single Family Rule
rules.body: Inter everywhere. No second font. Weight and size do all the work of hierarchy — no serif/sans pairing, no display font, no decorative typography. This keeps the focus on the music notation and instruments, not on typographic flourish.

rules.name: The No-Shadow Default Rule
rules.body: Containers do not cast shadows at rest. Their depth is implicit from opacity layering. Shadows are reserved for floating overlays (modals, dropdowns, tooltips) that need to be visually pulled out of the glass stack.

dos: Use gold (#fbbf24) for all interactive highlights — it's the one voice across buttons, nav, pills, and progress.
Use the layered glass system for depth — opacity + blur, not drop shadows.
Keep body text at ink-primary (#ffffff) or ink-secondary (#9ca3af) with verified WCAG AA contrast on the dark gradient background.
Use playful micro-interactions: scale transforms on buttons, lift on cards, glow on active pills.
Use text-wrap: balance on headings and text-wrap: pretty on long body text.
Make interactive instruments (fretboard, keyboard) the hero — chrome and decoration step back.
donts: Don't use gradient text for decorative purposes (the logo is the one exception). Use a single solid color for emphasis via weight or size.
Don't use box-shadows as a general depth mechanism. Depth belongs to the glass layering system.

Don't treat the sidebar section labels (Learn, Play, Create, System) as a required pattern for every page — they're navigation structure, not a content kicker. Avoid adding similar eyebrow labels above page sections.
Don't use side-stripe borders (border-left greater than 1px as a colored accent on cards or callouts). Use full borders, background tints, or nothing.
Don't default to identical card grids (same-sized cards with icon + heading + text) without considering whether the content would be better served by varied layouts.
Don't default to glassmorphism without purpose — the glass layering system is for containers and panels, not for decorative card effects.
Don't let text overflow its container. Test headings at every breakpoint.
Don't animate CSS layout properties. Use transform and opacity only.
Don't forget reduced motion: every animation needs a prefers-reduced-motion fallback.
